faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in San Mateo?
faq.answer: For San Mateo homes, Bay Area homeowners typically see about $1,500-$3,000 per window installed for quality vinyl, and more for fiberglass, clad-wood or architectural products. Deluxe Windows itemizes product, labor and permits in a written San Mateo quote after free on-site measurements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to replace windows in San Mateo?
faq.answer: Permitting: San Mateo follows standard California permitting, confirmed per project scope. Deluxe Windows verifies requirements with the building department and manages the paperwork for San Mateo installations.

faq.question: Which window brands work best for San Mateo homes?
faq.answer: Popular choices in San Mateo include Milgard, Anlin and Simonton vinyl for value, and Marvin or Andersen for premium projects. The right pick depends on the home's age, style and exposure in San Mateo.

faq.question: How long does window replacement take in San Mateo?
faq.answer: Most San Mateo projects are measured in one visit and installed in one to three working days once windows arrive, typically four to eight weeks after ordering.
